name: profiles-with-liveness-today
description: Find profiles that have a livenessverifications record created today, by chaining two MySQL queries.

steps.log: Step 1 — livenessverifications created in the last ${sinceDays} day(s) (0 = today only)...

steps.exec: sdkck mysql query "SELECT DISTINCT profile_id FROM livenessverifications WHERE created_at >= CURDATE() - INTERVAL ${sinceDays} DAY AND created_at < CURDATE() + INTERVAL 1 DAY LIMIT 10000" --format json --skip-confirmation 2>/dev/null

steps.log: Found ${liveness.length} profile(s) with a livenessverifications record in that window.

then.log: Step 2 — fetching the matching profile rows...

then.exec: sdkck mysql query "SELECT id, uid, user_id, site_id, sex, account_type FROM profiles WHERE id IN (${liveness[*].profile_id}) LIMIT 10000" --format json --skip-confirmation 2>/dev/null

else.log: No livenessverifications records in that window — no profiles to fetch.
